highlights.text: This pullback was triggered on the loss of 5630 then 5585 back on Tuesday , and I provided this setup to readers last Friday at 4pm when I wrote: “Bear case Monday: There is no bear case until this flag breaks down at 5585-90.
As I wrote yesterday: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins on the fail of 5492.
This was a classic example of my core setup and edge: The Failed Breakdown.
5492 was not invicible though, and after 2 tests yesterday and a failed breakdown overnight, it finally cracked triggering a hard melt-down.
Generally, I’d want to see 5493 tested/one more failed breakdown of the zone.
This selloff took us down to the 5492 level yesterday, and 5492 is where we broke out of back on August 15th, and this was a key pivot for the last two days.
I wrote in yesterdays 4pm newsletter: “5494 is major support still.
I added: “Below 5492 I consider “knife catch protocol” to be activated and I’d be careful with all longs.

post_title: SPX Finally Snaps Its 4 Green Week In A Row Streak. Buyable Dip, Or More Red Ahead? Sept 9 Plan
